disclaimer: OPE here is a sanity check, not the headline.  The real-data Causal Forest predictions are biased downward by uncorrected selection (see Phase-5 causal narrative); the absolute numbers should be read as ordinal, not as expected INR.  Headline targeting evidence is the window-constrained scale-residualized Qini (+0.263 CF on real data, see uplift_eval.json).  For a production-quality value estimate we would run a geo-randomized rollout — see SOLUTION.md §4.
